economic_notes: GBEs include Pecheries Baie Chaleurs Fisheries (2012) Inc., Esgenoopetitj Power Centre Inc., and Esgenoopetitj Development Corporation Ltd. 715263 N.B. Inc. is not controlled and accounted for at cost. Esgenoopetitj Development Corporation Ltd. operates mini-casino operations.
notes: Audit is qualified due to mini-casino operations of Esgenoopetitj Development Corporation Ltd. where completeness of revenues is not susceptible to satisfactory audit verification. Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + Federal government + Health Canada + Provincial government = 24546598 + 4553626 + 2076860 + 422453 = 31599537. accumulated_surplus shows 36,555,913 on balance sheet but 36,555,914 on statement of changes - minor rounding difference, used balance sheet figure. Prior year 2021 surplus shown as 737,971 on changes statement vs 737,970 on operations statement.
